user_story: Como administrador, eu quero ser impedido de realizar ações inválidas (promover usuário inativo, me auto-demover, operar sobre o admin raiz) para que o sistema mantenha sua integridade de acesso.
test_output_summary: Backend: 12 unit tests passed (promote 6/6 + demote 6/6), 131 BF tests passed. Frontend: 287 tests passed. RF-006 frontend gap (canPromoteToAdmin missing SUPER_ADMIN_EMAIL check) identified and fixed in commit 33fac9e.
notes: RF-006 frontend guard was implicit (admin@admin.com is always ADMIN so role=MEMBER check excluded them). However PRD requires explicit check — fixed by adding user.email !== SUPER_ADMIN_EMAIL to canPromoteToAdmin. No UI visibility tests exist for guard conditions, but backend + BF tests fully cover all guard behaviors.
